title: eugenia lanceolata
intro: Eugenia lanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as the lanceleaf eugenia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Eugenia lanceolata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory and skin conditions.
